History.title: Transaction history
History.entrepreneurSubtitle: Review all incoming and outgoing venture movements
History.investorSubtitle: Review all wallet, investment and repayment movements
History.loadedFromCompleteHistory: Loaded from your complete recent history.
History.filtersSubtitle: Search by hash, wallet, email or movement type.
History.mobileFiltersSubtitle: Search by hash, transaction ID or email.
History.mobileSearchPlaceholder: Search by tx hash, email or ID
History.recentMovementsSubtitle: A production-style ledger table for wallet, investment and repayment activity.

Withdraw.title: Withdraw funds
Withdraw.subtitle: Request a compliant fiat payout from your InvestApp USD balance.
Withdraw.searchPlaceholder: Search withdrawals, wallets or bank accounts...
Withdraw.withdrawalRequestSubtitle: Choose a payout method and confirm the destination details.
Withdraw.fiatProcessingNotice: Fiat withdrawals will be processed. After confirmation, the app will send your USD to your bank account.
Withdraw.availableBalanceDescription: USD ready to withdraw from your wallet.
Withdraw.withdrawalMethodDescription: Choose how you want us to send the fiat payout.
Withdraw.hiddenTransfer: The hidden transfer is sent in USD on Polygon.
Withdraw.mustLeaveReserve: You must leave at least {reserve} USD in your account.
Withdraw.safeBalanceLimit: Enter {amount} USD or less to keep {reserve} USD available for network fees.
Withdraw.withdrawalRange: You can withdraw between {min} and {max} USD and keep {reserve} USD available for network fees.
Withdraw.successProcessing: Your withdrawal will be processed in 1 to 2 business days.
Withdraw.kycError: Could not verify your KYC status: {error}
Withdraw.signInRequired: You need to be signed in to request a withdrawal.
Withdraw.walletNotReady: Wait until your smart wallet is ready.
Withdraw.invalidAmount: Enter a valid amount to withdraw.
Withdraw.completeBankFields: Complete all bank withdrawal fields before confirming.
Withdraw.enterBreveKey: Enter the Breve key before confirming.
Withdraw.createRequestError: We could not create the withdrawal request.
Withdraw.onchainError: The on-chain withdrawal transfer could not be completed. Please try again.
Withdraw.finalizeRequestError: USD was sent, but we could not finalize the withdrawal request.

Notifications.title: Notifications

Notifications.notificationCenterDescription: Enable or mute alerts for movements in your wallet and account.
Notifications.disabledNotice: New alerts will stop being generated until you enable notifications again.
Notifications.empty: No notifications yet. Your next wallet or profile event will show up here.
